source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/05_HnX-P1, HnX-PB/03_설계개발 출력/13_작업표준서/Portable X-Ray Hnx_PB_Run Sheet_REV 01 (2) _2025.07.31.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Portable X-ray run sheet listing assembly checks and final inspection tests for HnX-P1 and HnX-PB models.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to record material/product serial information, assembly inspection results, final X-ray performance measurements, and OK/NG outcomes.
keyPoints: The sheet includes material and product serial fields such as TANK S/N, Collimater S/N, TUBE S/N, Inverter S/N, LCD NO, and Battery S/N.
Model columns identify HnX-P1-0-0, HnX-PB-0-1, HnX-P1-0-3, HnX-P1-0-5, HnX-P1-1-2, HnX-P1-1-4, and HnX-P1-1-6.
Assembly sections include SUB Assembly 1 Top Cover Ass'y, SUB Assembly 2 Botom Cover Ass'y, and SUB Assembly 3 Top & Bottom 형합.

Final inspection covers tube voltage, tube current, exposure time accuracy, timer, dose reproducibility and linearity, leakage dose, half-value layer, collimator performance, X-ray exposure control, console software linkage, and X-ray light beam difference tests.

evidence.claim: The document title is Portable X-ray Run Sheet.
The source filename indicates revision REV 01 and date 2025.07.31.
The run sheet applies to HnX-P1 and HnX-PB product models.
The sheet includes material and product serial-number fields.
evidence.evidenceText: 자재정보,,TANK S/N,,,,,,Collimater S/N,,,,,,TUBE S/N ... 제품정보,,Inverter S/N,,,,,,LCD NO,,,,,,Battery S/N

evidence.claim: Top Cover Ass'y inspections include visual checks for coating defects, dents, scratches, LCD condition, guide/rubber/cap fastening, inverter assembly state, connectors, bolts, socket connector cover, and screw-lock application.
evidence.evidenceText: SUB Assembly 1,Top Cover Ass'y ... 육안검사 ... TOP Cover 외관 도장 상태 ... LCD 외관 상태 ... Gudie & Rubber & Cap 체결 상태 ... Inverter Ass'y ... 볼트 체결 누락 ... Socket , Connector Cover 체결상태 ... Socket Connector 네지록 도포 상태

evidence.claim: Bottom Cover Ass'y inspections include cover coating, case attachment, hand strap fastening, collimator assembly condition, O-ring fastening, tank/bracket bolts, battery bracket bolts, heat pad attachment, and cable connection checks.
evidence.evidenceText: SUB Assembly 2,Botom Cover Ass'y ... Bottom Cover 외관 도장 상태 ... 핸드 스트랩 볼트 체결 ... Collimater Ass'y 외관 상태 확인 ... Collimater Ass'y Oring 체결 상태 ... Tank 및 Tank Bracket 볼트 체결 ... Battery Bracket 볼트 체결 ... 발열 PAD 부착 ... Tank , Collomtaer , inverter Cable 연결

evidence.claim: Final tube voltage testing uses conditions of 1 m measurement distance and 2.0 mmAL filter, with ±10% specification at 50 kV, 60 kV, 70 kV, 80 kV, and 90 kV test points.
Final tube current testing uses conditions of 1 m measurement distance and 2.0 mmAL filter, with ±10% specification.
Exposure time accuracy testing uses 60 kV and 90 kV test points with ±10% specification.

evidence.evidenceText: 조사선량 재현성 &선형성 시험 ... 조사선량재현성[A] ... CV≤0.05 ... 조사선량재현성[B] ... CV≤0.05

evidence.claim: Leakage dose testing specifies a limit of 100 mR/hr at five measurement positions.
evidence.evidenceText: 누설선량 시험 ... 측정 1번 부위 ... 100mR/hr 이내 ... 측정 5번 부위 ... 100mR/hr 이내

evidence.claim: Half-value layer testing records 90 kV, 16 mAs conditions and a 3.2 mm or greater result criterion.
evidence.evidenceText: 반가출시험 ... 조사조건 : 90kV,16mAs/Dose HVL 값을 측정한다. ... B/A > 0.52 ... 3.2 mm 이상

evidence.claim: Collimator performance criteria include maximum field more than 35×35 cm at SID 65 cm, minimum field less than 5×5 cm at SID 100 cm, illuminance more than 160 Lux at SID 100 cm, and open/close display within 2% of SID.
evidence.evidenceText: Collimator 성능시험 ... Max. X-ray light field ... more than 35×35㎝ at SID 65㎝ ... Min. X-ray light field ... less than 5×5㎝ at SID100㎝ ... Illuminance ... more than 160Lux at SID 100㎝ ... Open/close display - X-ray exposure graduation or measurement ... within 2% of SID

evidence.claim: X-ray exposure control testing verifies that continuous exposure or next-step exposure must not occur while holding the hand switch, and that X-ray exposure stops when the hand switch is opened.
evidence.evidenceText: X-ray 조사제어 시험 ... 핸드스위치를 누르고 있는 상태에서 연속노출 또는 다음단계의 노출이 되어서는 않된다. ... X-ray 조사 중 핸드 스위치를 Open 하면 X-ray 조사가 멈춰야 한다.

evidence.claim: Console Software linkage testing checks matching KV and mAs display, X-ray status information, and error information.
evidence.evidenceText: Console Software 연동 Test ... X-ray 설비 or Console Software에서 KV, mAs 변경시 동일하게 표기되어야 한다. ... Console Software에 X-ray 상태 정보가 표기 되는지 확인 한다. ( 베터리 량, Lamp, SID 등) ... X-ray설비의 에러 정보가 동일하게 표기 되는지 확인 한다.

evidence.claim: X-ray Light Beam Difference testing specifies ≤10 mm for e1 through e4 measurements.
evidence.evidenceText: X-ray Light Beam Difference 시험 ... Beam Difference시험 ... ≤10mm ... e1 ... e2 ... e3 ... e4

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal is FDA in metadata, but FDA or any jurisdictional authority is not present in the extracted source text.
Revision and document date are derived from the sourcePath filename rather than from a clearly labeled field in the sheet text.
No standards are explicitly cited in the source text.
Source text appears to be CSV-style spreadsheet extraction with repeated row numbers and spelling variants such as Collimater/Collomtaer and Botom/Bottom.
